title: Mine Mine No Mi Black Blades
description: Train your weapon bond your weapon master your weapon and turn it into a Legendary Meito Black Blade
body: # Mine Mine No Mi - BlackBlades ## What is this? You know how in One Piece, swords like Yoru and Shusui turned black after years of battle? This mod adds that to Minecraft. Use a sword long enough with Haki, fight strong enemies, and it'll permanently turn into a Black Blade. But that's not all - named blades can also awaken as **Meito**, gaining tiered grades, better Haki synergy, and stronger identity as legendary weapons. Brawlers and Black Leg fighters can also forge their own fists into weapons too. Train hard enough and your bare hands become Black Fists. *** ## Black Blades (Swords) ### How it works To turn a sword into a Black Blade, you need to: * **Name it** - Give your sword a name at an anvil * **Use it** - Keep it in your hand for a while (1 hour by default) * **Imbue it** - Have Busoshoku Haki active while holding it (30 min total) * **Fight** - Kill 50 enemies with 1500+ doriki while imbuing Progress tracks in your mainhand, offhand, and mouth slot (for Santoryu users with Cart Addon). Once you hit all the requirements, your sword transforms. You'll hear the Haki sound, see dark particles, and get a server-wide announcement. Forged Black Blades can also awaken with a **curse**. Curses are random by default, making some blades much rarer and more dangerous than others. ### What Black Blades do * Always look imbued (dark tint) * +5 attack damage (base) * Built-in Unbreaking V (no enchant glint) * Bypass Logia without needing Haki active * Black sweep attack particles * 20% armor penetration * +25% critical hit damage * 1.15x damage when Haki is active ### Cursed Black Blades When a sword becomes a Black Blade, it has a chance to awaken with one of three curses: | Curse |What it does | | ------------- |-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Enma's Hunger |Drains weak wielders over time, but rewards strong Busoshoku control with extra damage | | Death Omen |Applies Unluck, attracts nearby monsters, and makes incoming danger worse | | Bloodthirst |Punishes staying out of combat, but heals and empowers you after kills | Curses are stored on the blade itself, show up in the tooltip, and can be tested directly with admin commands. ### Rank System Your Black Blade evolves as you keep fighting with it. Kill enough enemies after forging and it ranks up: | Rank |Kills Needed |Bonus Damage |Armor Pen | | -------------------- |------------ |------------ |--------- | | Black Blade (Forged) |0 |+5.0 |20% | | Awakened |100 |+7.0 |25% | | Mastered |350 |+10.0 |32.5% | | Legendary |850 |+15.0 |42.5% | Higher ranks also get better crit bonuses. Legendary blades get a server-wide announcement when achieved. ### Visual / Tooltip Changes Black Blade tooltips are cleaner now: * The main **Black Blade** header always stays visible * Rank, curse info, damage bonuses, and battle stats move into the **SHIFT** statistics view * Legendary styling uses gold for important visual elements * Curse names and descriptions appear in the expanded tooltip ### Commands | Command |What it does | | -------------------------------------------------------------- |--------------------------------------------------------- | | /blackblade name name |Name your held blade for Black Blade / Meito progression | | /blackblade status |Check your sword's progress, rank, and curse | | /blackblade stats |View detailed combat stats, rank progress, and curse info | | /blackblade leaderboard |View server-wide Black Blade leaderboard | | /blackblade meitopool |View remaining natural Meito slots by tier | | /blackblade forge |Force turn held sword into Black Blade (OP) | | /blackblade unforge |Remove Black Blade status (OP) | | /blackblade clear |Wipe all progress data (OP) | | /blackblade fillprogress |Max out all requirements (OP) | | /blackblade setwieldtime ticks |Set wield time (OP) | | /blackblade sethakitime ticks |Set imbue time (OP) | | /blackblade setkills number |Set kill count (OP) | | /blackblade setrank 1-4 |Set rank directly (OP) | | /blackblade setcurse none\\|enma\\|deathomen\\|bloodthirst |Force a specific curse for testing (OP) | | /blackblade setmeito none\|grade\|skillful\|great\|supreme |Set Meito grade directly for testing (OP) | | /blackblade completemeitotrial grade\|skillful\|great\|supreme |Complete a Meito trial tier instantly (OP) | | /blackblade flush |Flush buffered Black Blade progress to NBT (OP) | ### Advancements * **Kokutōshi** - Forge your own Black Blade * **Inheritor** - Receive a Black Blade forged by another swordsman *** ## Meito System ### What it is Meito is the legendary blade grading system for named weapons. Instead of every strong sword being treated the same, eligible blades can awaken through four Meito tiers: | Tier |Role | | -------------- |------------------------------------------------- | | Grade |Entry-level legendary blade | | Skillful Grade |Refined named blade with stronger combat bonuses | | Great Grade |Rare high-end Meito with strong Haki synergy | | Supreme Grade |Top-tier Meito reserved for the strongest weapons | Natural Meito is world-limited, so the rarest grades stay rare instead of every server ending up full of top-tier blades. ### How it works Every eligible weapon gets a hidden **Meito potential**. By default this comes from the weapon's displayed main-hand attack damage, though canon overrides can force specific swords into the right tier. To enter natural Meito progression, the blade must be **named**. Once named, it can awaken and climb one rank at a time until it reaches its hidden potential. Meito does **not** jump straight to the final result. A sword with Great or Supreme potential still has to grow through the lower ranks first. If a natural Meito tier is full, the blade keeps its progress and waits until a world slot opens. ### Default trial flow By default, each promotion uses scaled versions of the Black Blade requirements: | Next Meito Tier |Wield Time |Strong Kills |Haki Required | | --------------- |---------- |------------ |------------- | | Grade |15 min |13 |No | | Skillful Grade |30 min |25 |No | | Great Grade |45 min |38 |22.5 min | | Supreme Grade |60 min |50 |30 min | Strong kills use the same strong-enemy logic as Black Blade progression by default, meaning enemies with **1500+ doriki** count unless the server owner changes that config. ### How to use it * **Get an eligible weapon** - The blade needs enough attack power to qualify, or a canon override like Wado Ichimonji or Nidai Kitetsu * **Name it** - Named blades can begin natural Meito progression; unnamed blades will not naturally awaken * **Use it in combat** - Fight with the blade to build wield time and strong kill progress * **Use Haki for higher tiers** - Great Grade and Supreme Grade also require Busoshoku Haki imbue time * **Promote one step at a time** - Each completed trial only raises the blade by one Meito tier * **Check the tooltip or `/blackblade status`** - The mod now shows Meito potential, current tier, next trial, and Meito bonuses more clearly ### What Meito does Meito bonuses are tied to the weapon's **displayed** Meito grade: | Meito Tier |Final Damage |Haki Damage |Haki Efficiency |Enchant Bonus |Double-Level Chance | | -------------- |------------ |----------- |--------------- |------------- |------------------- | | Grade |+4% |+3% |+5% |+4 |5% | | Skillful Grade |+8% |+8% |+10% |+8 |12% | | Great Grade |+14% |+15% |+18% |+14 |25% | | Supreme Grade |+22% |+25% |+30% |+22 |40% | Meito also improves the identity of named blades without giving them their own armor penetration system. If that weapon later becomes a **Black Blade**, its displayed Meito grade increases by **one tier** for bonus calculation and presentation, up to Supreme Grade. ### Meito commands | Command |What it does | | -------------------------------------------------------------- |------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | /blackblade status |Shows Meito potential, current grade, next trial, and progression | | /blackblade stats |Shows Meito bonuses, Black Blade bonuses, rank, curse, and combat data | | /blackblade meitopool |Shows how many Grade, Skillful, Great, and Supreme natural slots are still open | | /blackblade setmeito none\|grade\|skillful\|great\|supreme |Sets a Meito grade directly (OP) | | /blackblade completemeitotrial grade\|skillful\|great\|supreme |Completes a Meito trial tier instantly for testing (OP) | *** ## Black Fists (Brawler / Black Leg) ### How it works If you're a Brawler or Black Leg fighter, you can forge your fists into weapons. The requirements are similar to Black Blades: * **Train** - Stay in combat mode with empty hands (1 hour by default) * **Imbue** - Use Busoshoku Haki while training (30 min total) * **Fight** - Kill 75 enemies with 1500+ doriki with your bare hands Once you complete all three, your fists transform into Iron Fists. You'll get particles, sound effects, and a server announcement. ### What Black Fists do * +4 unarmed damage (base) * 15% armor penetration * +20% critical hit damage * 1.2x damage when Haki is active * Mine blocks with bare hands (see below) ### Rank System Just like Black Blades, your fists evolve with use: | Rank |Kills Needed |Bonus Damage |Armor Pen | | ------------------------ |------------ |------------ |--------- | | Iron Fist (Forged) |0 |+4.0 |15% | | Steel Fist (Awakened) |100 |+6.0 |20% | | Tekkai Fist (Mastered) |250 |+9.0 |30% | | Supreme Fist (Legendary) |500 |+14.0 |45% | ### Bare-Hand Mining Black Fist users can mine blocks with their bare hands. Your mining level depends on your rank: | Rank |Can Mine | | ------------------- |------------------------ | | Training (no forge) |Wood, dirt | | Iron Fist |Stone, cobblestone | | Steel Fist |Iron ore, lapis | | Tekkai Fist |Diamond, gold, emerald | | Supreme Fist |Obsidian, ancient debris | Mining speed is fast - at least 2.5x netherite tool speed. Using Haki while mining doubles it again. ### Fist of Love Passive The "Fist of Love" passive ability shows up for Brawlers and Black Leg fighters. It displays: * Your current rank and bonuses * Training progress (if not yet forged) * Rank progress and kills to next rank (if forged) It's display-only - the bonuses are always active as long as you meet the requirements. ### Commands | Command |What it does | | ---------------------------------------- |-------------------------------------------- | | /blackfist status |Check your training progress or current rank | | /blackfist stats |View detailed combat and mining stats | | /blackfist forge |Force forge your fists (OP) | | /blackfist unforge |Remove Black Fist status (OP) | | /blackfist clear |Wipe all Black Fist data (OP) | | /blackfist fillprogress |Max out all requirements (OP) | | /blackfist settrainingtime <ticks> |Set training time (OP) | | /blackfist sethakitime <ticks> |Set Haki time (OP) | | /blackfist setkills <number> |Set strong kills (OP) | | /blackfist setrank <1-4> |Set rank directly (OP) | *** ## Resource Pack Support BlackBlades supports custom textures for weapons from **any mod** (Cart Addon, EOP Addon, etc.)! ### How it works * **mineminenomi weapons** → Use built-in Black Blade textures * **Other mods' weapons** → Keep original appearance unless a resource pack provides custom textures ### Creating Custom Textures Place textures in the weapon's **original mod namespace**: ``` MyResourcePack/ ├── pack.mcmeta └── assets/ └── / └── textures/ └── item/ ├── _blackblade.png ├── _overlay_blackblade.png ├── _blackblade_sheathed.png (optional) └── _overlay_blackblade_sheathed.png (optional) ``` ### Texture Types | File |Layer |Purpose | | ---------------------------------------------- |------ |--------------------- | | <weapon>_blackblade.png |layer0 |Main texture / Handle | | <weapon>_overlay_blackblade.png |layer1 |Blade/Metal overlay | | <weapon>_blackblade_sheathed.png |layer0 |Sheathed handle | | <weapon>_overlay_blackblade_sheathed.png |layer1 |Sheathed blade | ### Examples **Cart Addon - Shigure:** ``` assets/cartaddon/textures/item/shigure_blackblade.png assets/cartaddon/textures/item/shigure_overlay_blackblade.png ``` **EOP Addon - Murakumogiri:** ``` assets/eopaddon/textures/item/murakumogiri_blackblade.png ``` ### pack.mcmeta ``` { "pack": { "pack_format": 6, "description": "Custom Black Blade textures for One Piece mods" } } ``` > **Tip:** Press F3+H in-game to see full item IDs (e.g., `cartaddon:shigure`) *** ## Config `config/blackblades-common.toml` You can change everything: **Black Blades:** * Wield time, Haki time, kills required * Doriki threshold for "strong" enemies * Damage bonus, armor penetration, crit bonus * Haki damage multiplier * Rank thresholds and bonuses * Cursed blade enable/disable and curse chance **Meito:** * Enable/disable the Meito system * Use natural Meito trials or force the highest grade immediately * Grade, Skillful, Great, and Supreme world slot counts * Attack damage thresholds for automatic Meito potential * Exclude tool-class items from automatic Meito grading * 1.16.5 Zitoen Piece ownership toggle **Black Fists:** * Training time, Haki time, kills required * Damage bonus, armor penetration, crit bonus * Mining levels per rank * Mining speed multiplier * Rank thresholds and bonuses *** ## Zitoen Piece Compatibility (1.16.5 Only) If Zitoen Piece is installed on 1.16.5, BlackBlades can now take ownership of overlapping grade and black blade behavior by default. That means: * BlackBlades handles the active sword progression instead of both mods trying to apply their own grade logic * Zitoen's overlapping grade combat bonuses no longer stack on top of BlackBlades when BlackBlades is set as main * Zitoen black blade progression no longer competes with BlackBlades while compatibility mode is enabled * A config toggle lets you hand control back to Zitoen Piece if you want its native behavior instead *** ## Notes * Black Blades can be traded/given to other players * The owner name is stored on the sword * Curses are stored on the blade and stay with it when traded * Natural Meito progression is stored on the blade and respects world-limited tier pools * Black Blades display one Meito tier higher than their underlying base Meito grade * Receiving a blade from another player grants the "Inheritor" advancement * Server leaderboard persists across restarts * Black Fist data is stored on the player (not an item) * Both systems track detailed stats: kills, damage, crits, boss kills, and Meito progression data * Black Blade and Black Fist text now supports lang-file translation
